basic_details.job_title: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 15 Project Associate I, Project Associate II and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR-Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (IHBT), Palampur
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate PAT-I, Senior-PAT, Project Associate PAT-II, Project Assistant PA-I etc.
basic_details.job_type: Purely Temporary (Project duration or till completion)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (IHBT) Palampur Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 11/2026) has been announced for multiple Project Associate, Senior Project Associate, and Project Assistant posts! Published recently, CSIR-IHBT is conducting Walk-in-Interviews for various temporary project positions under different projects related to Biomass to Chemicals, Natural Sweeteners, Tea Disease Detection, and Himalayan Bio-resources. Eligible candidates can appear for interviews on 10th to 14th August 2026 at CSIR-IHBT, Palampur (H.P.). Find complete details about CSIR IHBT Recruitment 20

age_limit.details: Most Project Associate positions: Maximum 35 years Senior Project Associate: Maximum 40 years Relaxation as per CSIR/GoI rules for reserved categories.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the exact essential qualifications mentioned against each post. All degrees must be from recognized universities/institutes. Desirable qualifications (research experience, specific skills) will be given preference. Detailed eligibility for each position is as follows: | 11001 - Project Associate PAT-I (Biomass to Chemicals Project): M.Sc. Chemistry / M.Pharma in Pharmaceutical Chemistry. Desirable: Experience in organic synthesis. 11002 - Senior Project Associate (Mogroside Sweetener Project): M.Sc. in Chemistry/Biochemistry/Phytochemistry/Industrial Chemistry/Pharmacy OR M.Tech/ME Chemical Engineering OR Doctoral Degree in relevant field + required years of research experience (3 years for Masters level or 2 years for PhD). Desirable: Hands-on experience with Membrane Filtration, Chromatography separation at lab/pilot scale with proven publications. 11003 - Project Associate PAT-II (Mogroside Project): M.Sc. Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry/Pharmacy OR B.Tech/BE Chemical/Industrial Engineering + 2 years research experience. Desirable: Working knowledge of Statistical software (ANOVA/Python/MatLab) and independent operation of HPLC for quantitative & qualitative analysis. 11004 & 11005 - Project Assistant PA-I (HRS-Tea Project): SSC/10th + ITI from recognized Board/Institute. Desirable (11004): Certified Drone Pilot with valid DGCA license and experience in mountainous regions. Desirable (11005): Work experience in IT/Computer or remote sensing laboratory with exposure to sophisticated instruments. 11006 - Project Associate PAT-I (HRS-Tea Project): M.Sc. in Horticulture/Agronomy/Tea Sciences/Biochemistry. Desirable: Working knowledge in Remote Sensing and GIS. 11007 & 11008 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): Master’s degree in Life Sciences/Biological Sciences/Biotechnology/Botany. Desirable (11007): Experience in plant cell and organ culture, metabolite biosynthetic pathway regulation, and transcriptomic analysis. Desirable (11008): Experience in plant tissue culture, molecular biology, or synthetic biology of medicinal and aromatic plants. 11009 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): B.E/B.Tech. or Master’s Degree in Remote Sensing/GIS/Geoinformatics/Geography/Forestry/Ecology/Computer Science. Desirable: Work experience in Remote Sensing/GIS. 11010 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent, or MCA. Desirable: Strong proficiency in web-based applications (front-end/back-end), relational databases, server administration, GIGW-compliant website development, dashboards, version control, and cybersecurity. 11011 - Project Associate PAT-I (Mogroside Project): M.Sc. in Food Science & Technology / Food Fermentation / Food and Nutrition. Desirable: Experience in Product development, testing, shelf life stability, and hands-on analytical skills.

salary_details.details: Stipend varies from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA depending on position, qualification, and NET/GATE status.

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview only. Candidates must report at 09:30 AM on the scheduled date with all original documents
and application form. Selection is based on academic records
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the official website.
Fill the form and bring it along with all supporting documents.
Appear for Walk-in-Interview on the respective date at CSIR-IHBT, Palampur (H.P.).
No separate call letter will be issued.
Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, age proof, caste certificate (if applicable), NET/GATE score card, etc.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Palampur Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy & Position Details
content_sections.text: Detailed project-wise positions are given below:

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must possess the exact essential qualifications mentioned against each post. All degrees must be from recognized universities/institutes. Desirable qualifications (research experience, specific skills) will be given preference. Detailed eligibility for each position is as follows: 11001 - Project Associate PAT-I (Biomass to Chemicals Project): M.Sc. Chemistry / M.Pharma in Pharmaceutical Chemistry. Desirable: Experience in organic synthesis. 11002 - Senior Project Associate (Mogroside Sweetener Project): M.Sc. in Chemistry/Biochemistry/Phytochemistry/Industrial Chemistry/Pharmacy OR M.Tech/ME Chemical Engineering OR Doctoral Degree in relevant field + required years of research experience (3 years for Masters level or 2 years for PhD). Desirable: Hands-on experience with Membrane Filtration, Chromatography separation at lab/pilot scale with proven publications. 11003 - Project Associate PAT-II (Mogroside Project): M.Sc. Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry/Pharmacy OR B.Tech/BE Chemical/Industrial Engineering + 2 years research experience. Desirable: Working knowledge of Statistical software (ANOVA/Python/MatLab) and independent operation of HPLC for quantitative & qualitative analysis. 11004 & 11005 - Project Assistant PA-I (HRS-Tea Project): SSC/10th + ITI from recognized Board/Institute. Desirable (11004): Certified Drone Pilot with valid DGCA license and experience in mountainous regions. Desirable (11005): Work experience in IT/Computer or remote sensing laboratory with exposure to sophisticated instruments. 11006 - Project Associate PAT-I (HRS-Tea Project): M.Sc. in Horticulture/Agronomy/Tea Sciences/Biochemistry. Desirable: Working knowledge in Remote Sensing and GIS. 11007 & 11008 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): Master’s degree in Life Sciences/Biological Sciences/Biotechnology/Botany. Desirable (11007): Experience in plant cell and organ culture, metabolite biosynthetic pathway regulation, and transcriptomic analysis. Desirable (11008): Experience in plant tissue culture, molecular biology, or synthetic biology of medicinal and aromatic plants. 11009 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): B.E/B.Tech. or Master’s Degree in Remote Sensing/GIS/Geoinformatics/Geography/Forestry/Ecology/Computer Science. Desirable: Work experience in Remote Sensing/GIS. 11010 - Project Associate PAT-I (Himalayan Bio-resources Project): B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent, or MCA. Desirable: Strong proficiency in web-based applications (front-end/back-end), relational databases, server administration, GIGW-compliant website development, dashboards, version control, and cybersecurity. 11011 - Project Associate PAT-I (Mogroside Project): M.Sc. in Food Science & Technology / Food Fermentation / Food and Nutrition. Desirable: Experience in Product development, testing, shelf life stability, and hands-on analytical skills.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Palampur Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Most Project Associate positions: Maximum 35 years Senior Project Associate: Maximum 40 years Relaxation as per CSIR/GoI rules for reserved categories.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 Stipend / Remuneration
content_sections.text: Stipend varies from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA depending on position, qualification, and NET/GATE status.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in-Interview only. Candidates must report at 09:30 AM on the scheduled date with all original documents, self-attested copies, and application form. Selection is based on academic records, experience, and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the official website. Fill the form and bring it along with all supporting documents. Appear for Walk-in-Interview on the respective date at CSIR-IHBT, Palampur (H.P.). No separate call letter will be issued. Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, age proof, caste certificate (if applicable), NET/GATE score card, etc.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Interviews are scheduled from 10th August to 14th August 2026 (position-specific dates).

faq.question: Q2. How many positions are announced in CSIR IHBT Advertisement No. 11/2026?
faq.answer: Multiple positions including 03 Project Associate PAT-I under Biomass to Chemicals project and others across various projects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend for Senior Project Associate at CSIR IHBT?
faq.answer: Rs. 42,000/- + 10% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Project Associate posts in CSIR IHBT Palampur?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years (as on the respective interview date).

faq.question: Q5. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for CSIR IHBT Project Associate?
faq.answer: It is not mandatory but candidates with NET/GATE get higher stipend (Rs. 35,000/- or 31,000/- + HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for Project Assistant PA-I posts?
faq.answer: SSC/10th + ITI from a recognized institute. Drone pilot license or IT experience is desirable for some positions.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interviews for CSIR IHBT Recruitment be held?
faq.answer: At CSIR-IHBT, Palampur (H.P.) starting at 09:30 AM.

faq.question: Q8. What projects are available under CSIR IHBT Advt. 11/2026?
faq.answer: Biomass to Chemicals, Mogroside Sweetener Scale-up, HRS-Tea Disease Detection, and Himalayan Bio-resources projects.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience mandatory for all positions in CSIR IHBT Recruitment?
faq.answer: Experience is desirable for most positions; some senior roles require 2–3 years of relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for CSIR IHBT Palampur temporary project jobs?
faq.answer: No online application — candidates must attend Walk-in-Interview with filled application form and documents on the specified dates.
